subcodes.first_line: O guest of those who remember! The season of the sword hath passed, and the summer's fasts are gone. Now is the time for honor to prevail [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضیف الذاکرین دوره سیف گذشت و صیام صیف از میان رفت حالا وقت الاکرام علی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
